financials.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT

overview.description: Netflix, Inc. provides entertainment services worldwide. The company offers television (TV) series, documentaries, feature films, games, and live programming across various genres and languages. It also provides members the ability to receive streaming content through a host of internet-connected devices, including TVs, digital video players, TV set-top boxes, and mobile devices. Netflix, Inc. was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Los Gatos, California.
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, Netflix's revenue was $45.18 billion, an increase of 15.85% compared to the previous year's $39.00 billion. Earnings were $10.98 billion, an increase of 26.05%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 50 analysts, the average rating for NFLX stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $113.49, which is an increase of 50.14% from the latest price.
